name: regressing
description: Touches a sensitive auth path; aggregate risk is low and agents agree, but the path forces escalation.

pr.title: Tweak session cookie max-age
pr.author: noor
pr.description: Lowers the session cookie max-age from 30d to 7d to reduce stale-session exposure.

security-review.summary: Shortening session lifetime is generally safe but it changes authentication behaviour, which warrants a human look.

findings.title: Session lifetime change
findings.detail: SESSION_MAX_AGE_DAYS dropped from 30 to 7; verify no integration depends on the longer window.

semantic-review.summary: The change matches the stated intent of reducing the session window.
semantic-review.intentSummary: Reduce session cookie max-age to 7 days.
